'''Denive Balmforth''' (born 1 October 2003) is a {{rlnt|Wales}} international [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|hk}} or {{rlp|lf}} for the [[York Knights]] in the [[Super League]], on loan from [[Hull F.C.]].

==Playing career==
===Hull FC===
In 2022, he made his [[Hull F.C.|Hull]] début in the [[Super League]] against [[Toulouse Olympique]].<ref>[https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/61245703 Super League: Hull FC 48-12 Toulouse - Hat-tricks for Darnell McIntosh & Connor Wynne]</ref>

===Swinton Lions (loan)===
On 25 May 2024 it was reported that he had joined [[Swinton Lions]] on short term loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Swinton Lions |date=25 May 2024|accessdate=13 June 2024|title= HULL FC STARLET JOIN LIONS ON LOAN|url= https://swintonlionsrlfc.co.uk/news/hull-fc-starlet-join-lions-on-loan/}}</ref>

===Catalans Dragons (loan)===
On 25 June 2025 he joined the [[Catalans Dragons]] on loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Catalan Dragons |date=25 June 2025|accessdate=25 June 2025|title= Denive Balmforth joins the Dragons|url= http://www.catalansdragons.com/en/articles-9/299-12744-denive-balmforth-join-the-dragons/}}</ref>

Hull FC recalled him on 8 September 2025, ready for the forthcoming clash with [[Warrington Wolves]] at the weekend.

In October 2025 he was selected for the Wales squad for their matches against Ireland.<ref>https://wrl.wales/mens-squad-named-for-ireland-fixtures</ref>

===York Knights (loan)===
In October 2025 it was announced he would be joining super league newcomers [[York Knights]] for the 2026 season. <ref>{{cite web|website=Hull Daily Mail|date=27 Oct 2025|author=Daniel Tomlinson|title= Hull FC hooker Denive Balmforth joins Super League newcomers in latest loan move FC|url= https://www.hulldailymail.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/hull-fc-hooker-denive-balmforth-10601484}}</ref>

===International===
He made his international debut for {{rlnt|Wales}}, starting at {{rlp|hb}}, in the 24-0 win over {{rlnt|Ireland}} in [[Neath]] on 25 October 2025 in the two-match series.<ref>{{cite web|website=Hull Daily Mail|date=26 Oct 2025|author=Daniel Tomlinson|title=Hull FC and Hull KR players feature on international stage as France secure World Cup place|url=https://www.hulldailymail.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/hull-fc-hull-kr-players-10600483}}</ref>
